testcases.input: fn = (a,b,c) => (a + b + c), calls = [[1,2,3],[2,3,6]] Output: [{"calls":1,"value":6}] Explanation: const onceFn = once(fn); onceFn(1, 2, 3); // 6 onceFn(2, 3, 6); // undefined, fn was not called
testcases.expectedOutput: [{"calls":1,"value":6}] Explanation: const onceFn = once(fn); onceFn(1, 2, 3); // 6 onceFn(2, 3, 6); // undefined, fn was not called

testcases.input: fn = (a,b,c) => (a * b * c), calls = [[5,7,4],[2,3,6],[4,6,8]] Output: [{"calls":1,"value":140}] Explanation: const onceFn = once(fn); onceFn(5, 7, 4); // 140 onceFn(2, 3, 6); // undefined, fn was not called onceFn(4, 6, 8); // undefined, fn was not called
testcases.expectedOutput: [{"calls":1,"value":140}] Explanation: const onceFn = once(fn); onceFn(5, 7, 4); // 140 onceFn(2, 3, 6); // undefined, fn was not called onceFn(4, 6, 8); // undefined, fn was not called
